invariants.claim: RWA/receipt semantics live outside NovaSeal core.
Every signed RWA receipt intent commits to NovaSealCanonicalEnvelopeV0.
Only the issuer authority may materialise a new RWA receipt.
invariants.location: materialize_rwa_receipt issuer_sig.pubkey guard and BIP340 verifier call

invariants.claim: Only the current holder authority may claim a materialised receipt.
invariants.location: claim_rwa_receipt holder_sig.pubkey guard and BIP340 verifier call

invariants.claim: Settlement requires both issuer and holder authority signatures.
Claim and settlement preserve the committed integer amount.
Each lifecycle edge creates an immutable NovaRwaReceiptEventV0 event.
invariants.location: materialize, claim, and settle create event statements

invariants.claim: Claim and settlement increment nonce exactly once and reject u64 overflow.
Materialise -> claim -> settle must execute on live devnet before V1 readiness.
